speaker: YOUNG ANNA
text: Wake up. Wake up. Wake up.

text: I just can't. The sky's awake, so I'm awake, so we have to play.

text: Do you want to build a snowman?

text: Come on, come on, come on, come on.

text: Do the magic! Do the magic!

text: It was an accident. I'm sorry, Anna.

text: ...I know where we have to go.

text: Your Majesty. Born with the powers or cursed?

speaker: GRAND PABBIE
text: You are lucky it wasn't her heart. The heart is not so easily changed, but the head can be persuaded.

speaker: GRAND PABBIE
text: I recommend we remove all magic, even memories of magic to be safe.... But don't worry, I'll leave the fun.

speaker: YOUNG ANNA
text: DO YOU WANT TO BUILD A SNOWMAN? COME ON LET'S GO AND PLAY.

speaker: YOUNG ANNA
text: I NEVER SEE YOU ANYMORE. COME OUT THE DOOR. IT'S LIKE YOU'VE GONE AWAY.

speaker: YOUNG ANNA
text: WE USED TO BE BEST BUDDIES AND NOW WE'RE NOT. I WISH YOU WOULD TELL ME WHY.

speaker: YOUNG ANNA
text: DO YOU WANT TO BUILD A SNOWMAN?

speaker: ANNA
text: DO YOU WANT TO BUILD A SNOWMAN?

speaker: ANNA
text: Elsa? PLEASE I KNOW YOU'RE IN THERE PEOPLE ARE ASKING WHERE YOU'VE BEEN THEY SAY HAVE COURAGE AND I'M TRYING TO I'M RIGHT OUT HERE FOR YOU. PLEASE LET ME IN.

speaker: ANNA
text: WE ONLY HAVE EACH OTHER. IT'S JUST YOU AND ME. WHAT ARE WE GONNA DO? DO YOU WANT TO BUILD A SNOWMAN?

text: THE WINDOW IS OPEN! SO'S THAT DOOR! I DIDN'T KNOW THEY DID THAT ANYMORE. WHO KNEW WE OWNED 8000 SALAD PLATES...?

speaker: ANNA
text: FOR YEARS I HAVE ROAMED THESE EMPTY HALLS WHY HAVE A BALLROOM WITH NO BALLS? FINALLY, THEY'RE OPENING UP THE GATES!

speaker: ANNA
text: THERE'LL BE REAL, ACTUAL PEOPLE - IT'LL BE TOTALLY STRANGE. BUT WOW AM I SO READY FOR THIS CHANGE!

speaker: ANNA
text: FOR THE FIRST TIME IN FOREVER, THERE'LL BE MUSIC, THERE'LL BE LIGHT. FOR THE FIRST TIME IN FOREVER, I'LL BE DANCING THROUGH THE NIGHT.

speaker: ANNA
text: DON'T KNOW IF I'M ELATED OR GASSY, BUT I'M SOMEWHERE IN THAT ZONE 'CAUSE FOR THE FIRST TIME IN FOREVER, I WON'T BE ALONE. I can't wait to meet everyone.... What if I meet THE ONE?

speaker: ANNA
text: TONIGHT, IMAGINE ME GOWN AND ALL- FETCHINGLY DRAPED AGAINST THE WALL. THE PICTURE OF SOPHISTICATED GRACE.

speaker: ANNA
text: I SUDDENLY SEE HIM STANDING THERE, A BEAUTIFUL STRANGER TALL AND FAIR. I WANNA STUFF SOME CHOCOLATE IN MY FACE!

speaker: ANNA
text: BUT THEN WE LAUGH AND TALK ALL EVENING, WHICH IS TOTALLY BIZARRE. NOTHING LIKE THE LIFE I'VE LED SO FAR.

speaker: ANNA
text: FOR THE FIRST TIME IN FOREVER, THERE'LL BE MAGIC, THERE'LL BE FUN. FOR THE FIRST TIME IN FOREVER, I COULD BE NOTICED BY SOMEONE. AND I KNOW IT IS TOTALLY CRAZY TO DREAM I'D FIND ROMANCE. BUT FOR THE FIRST TIME IN FOREVER, AT LEAST I'VE GOT A CHANCE!

speaker: ELSA
text: DON'T LET THEM IN. DON'T LET THEM SEE. BE THE GOOD GIRL YOU ALWAYS HAVE TO BE.

text: CONCEAL. DON'T FEEL. PUT ON A SHOW. MAKE ONE WRONG MOVE AND EVERYONE WILL KNOW.

speaker: ELSA
text: TELL THE GUARDS TO OPEN UP THE GATE.

text: I KNOW IT ALL ENDS TOMORROW, SO IT HAS TO BE TODAY!! `CAUSE FOR THE FIRST TIME IN FOREVER. . . FOR THE FIRST TIME IN FOREVER! NOTHING'S IN MY WAY!!!

text: I'm so sorry. Are you hurt?

speaker: ANNA

text: And what is that amazing smell?

text: Weselton. The Duke of Weselton. Your Majesty, as your closest partner in trade, it seems only fitting that I offer you your first dance as queen.

text: If you swoon, let me know, I'll catch you.

speaker: DUKE
text: Like an agile peacock... CLUCK- CLUGGLE-CLUCK!

text: I often had the whole parlor to myself to slide... Oops. Sorry.

text: Oops! Pardon. Sorry. Can we just get around you there? Thank you. Oh, there she is. Elsa!

text: THE SNOW GLOWS WHITE ON THE MOUNTAIN TONIGHT, NOT A FOOTPRINT TO BE SEEN. A KINGDOM OF ISOLATION AND IT LOOKS LIKE I'M THE QUEEN. THE WIND IS HOWLING LIKE THIS SWIRLING STORM INSIDE. COULDN'T KEEP IT IN, HEAVEN KNOWS I TRIED. . . DON'T LET THEM IN, DON'T LET THEM SEE, BE THE GOOD GIRL YOU ALWAYS HAVE TO BE. CONCEAL, DON'T FEEL, DON'T LET THEM KNOW. WELL, NOW THEY KNOW.

speaker: ELSA
text: LET IT GO. LET IT GO. CAN'T HOLD IT BACK ANYMORE.

speaker: ELSA
text: LET IT GO. LET IT GO. TURN AWAY AND SLAM THE DOOR. I DON'T CARE WHAT THEY'RE GOING TO SAY. LET THE STORM RAGE ON. THE COLD NEVER BOTHERED ME ANYWAY.

text: IT'S FUNNY HOW SOME DISTANCE MAKES EVERYTHING SEEM SMALL. AND THE FEARS THAT ONCE CONTROLLED ME CAN'T GET TO ME AT ALL. IT'S TIME TO SEE WHAT I CAN DO, TO TEST THE LIMITS AND BREAK THROUGH. NO RIGHT, NO WRONG, NO RULES FOR ME...I'M FREE!

speaker: ELSA

speaker: ELSA
text: MY POWER FLURRIES THROUGH THE AIR INTO THE GROUND. MY SOUL IS SPIRALING IN FROZEN FRACTALS ALL AROUND. AND ONE THOUGHT CRYSTALLIZES LIKE AN ICY BLAST-

speaker: ELSA

speaker: ANNA
text: Oh no. No. No. No. Come back. No. No. No. No.... Oooo-kay.

speaker: OAKEN

speaker: OAKEN
text: Oh dear, that's no good. See these are from our winter stock, where supply and demand have a big problem.

text: Yes! Now, back up while I deal with this crook here.

text: No Sven, I didn't get your carrots.

speaker: OAKEN
text: I'm sorry about this violence. I will add a quart of lutefisk, so we'll have good feelings. Just the outfit and boots, yah?

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: REINDEERS ARE BETTER THAN PEOPLE. SVEN, DON'T YOU THINK THAT'S TRUE? KRISTOFF YEAH, PEOPLE WILL BEAT YOU & CURSE YOU & CHEAT YOU. EVERY ONE OF EM'S BAD, EXCEPT YOU. Oh, thanks, Buddy. BUT PEOPLE SMELL BETTER THAN REINDEERS. SVEN, DON'T YOU THINK I'M RIGHT? THAT'S ONCE AGAIN TRUE, FOR ALL EXCEPT YOU. YOU GOT ME. LET'S CALL IT A NIGHT. GOOD NIGHT. DON'T LET THE FROSTBITE BITE.

text: Oh, it's just you. What do you want?

text: I want you to take me up the North Mountain.

speaker: ANNA
text: Take me up the North Mountain.... Please.

text: Excuse me, sir. He's a prince.

speaker: ANNA
text: Ew. Look it doesn't matter; it's true love.

text: Are you some sort of love expert?

text: No, no, no. I'd like to meet these--

speaker: KRISTOFF

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: You almost set me on fire!

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: You don't tell him what to do!

text: You are?! I mean, sure. I'll let you tag along.

text: ...But it'll be fine. Elsa will thaw it.

speaker: ANNA
text: ...Yeah. Now come on. This way to the North Mountain?

text: I never knew winter could be so beautiful.

text: Come on, it's just a head.

speaker: HANS
text: Princess Anna has given her orders and--

speaker: DUKE
text: And that's another thing; has it dawned on you that your princess may be conspiring with a wicked sorceress to destroy us all?

speaker: HANS
text: Do not question the Princess. She left me in charge, and I will not hesitate to protect Arendelle from treason.

speaker: HANS
text: Whoa! Whoa! Whoa, boy. Easy. Easy.

speaker: CROWD
text: Princess Anna's horse. What happened to her? Where is she?

speaker: HANS
text: ...Princess Anna is in trouble. I need volunteers to go with me to find her!

speaker: DUKE
text: I volunteer two men, my Lord! Be prepared for anything, and should you encounter the Queen, you are to put an end to this winter. Do you understand?

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: So how exactly are you planning to stop this weather?

speaker: ANNA
text: Oh, I am gonna talk to my sister.

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: That's your plan? My ice business is riding on you talking to your sister.

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: So you're not at all afraid of her?

speaker: OLAF
text: Yeah. I bet Elsa's the nicest, gentlest, warmest person ever.

speaker: OLAF
text: Oh, look at that. I've been impaled.

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: ...It's too steep. I've only got one rope, and you don't know how to climb mountains.

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: I wouldn't put my foot there.

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: Or there. How do you know Elsa even wants to see you?

speaker: ANNA
text: I'm just blocking you out cause I gotta concentrate here.

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: You know, most people who disappear into the mountains want to be alone.

speaker: ANNA
text: Nobody wants to be alone. Except maybe you--

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: I'm not alone.... I have friends, remember?

speaker: ANNA
text: ...Does the air seem a bit thin to you up here?

speaker: OLAF
text: Hey, Sven? Not sure if this is going to solve the problem, but I found a staircase that leads exactly where you want it to go.

speaker: ANNA
text: Thanks! That was like a crazy trust exercise.

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: Now that's ice. I might cry.

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: All right, take it easy. I gotcha.

speaker: OLAF
text: ...Knock.... Just knock.... Why isn't she knocking...? Do you think she knows how to knock?

speaker: ANNA
text: Ha. It opened. That's a first.

speaker: ANNA
text: You should probably wait out here.

speaker: ANNA
text: Last time I introduced her to a guy, she froze everything.

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: But, it's a palace made of ice. Ice is my life.

speaker: ANNA
text: Elsa, you look different.... It's a good different.... And this place is amazing.

speaker: ELSA
text: Thank you, I never knew what I was capable of.

speaker: ANNA
text: ...I'm so sorry about what happened. If I'd known--

speaker: ELSA
text: No, it's okay. You don't have to apologize.... But you should probably go, please.

speaker: ELSA
text: No, I belong here. Alone. Where I can be who I am without hurting anybody.

speaker: OLAF
text: Hi, I'm Olaf and I like warm hugs.

speaker: OLAF
text: You built me. You remember that?

speaker: ANNA
text: He's just like the one we built as kids.... We were so close. We can be like that again.

speaker: ELSA
text: I'm just trying to protect you.

speaker: ANNA
text: You don't have to protect me. I'm not afraid. Please don't shut me out again.

speaker: ANNA
text: PLEASE DON'T SLAM THE DOOR. YOU DON'T HAVE TO KEEP YOUR DISTANCE ANYMORE. `CAUSE FOR THE FIRST TIME IN FOREVER, I FINALLY UNDERSTAND. FOR THE FIRST TIME IN FOREVER, WE CAN FIX THIS HAND IN HAND. WE CAN HEAD DOWN THIS MOUNTAIN TOGETHER. YOU DON'T HAVE TO LIVE IN FEAR. `CAUSE FOR THE FIRST TIME IN FOREVER, I WILL BE RIGHT HERE.

speaker: ELSA
text: Anna, PLEASE GO BACK HOME. YOUR LIFE AWAITS. GO ENJOY THE SUN AND OPEN UP THE GATES.

speaker: ELSA
text: I know! YOU MEAN WELL, BUT LEAVE ME BE. YES, I'M ALONE BUT I'M ALONE AND FREE.

speaker: ELSA
text: JUST STAY AWAY AND YOU'LL BE SAFE FROM ME.

speaker: ELSA
text: WHAT DO YOU MEAN YOU'RE NOT?

speaker: ANNA
text: I GET THE FEELING YOU DON'T KNOW?

speaker: ANNA
text: ARENDELLE'S IN DEEP DEEP DEEP DEEP SNOW.

speaker: ANNA
text: You kind of set off an eternal winter...everywhere.

speaker: ANNA
text: It's okay, you can just unfreeze it.

speaker: ELSA
text: No, I can't. I don't know how.

speaker: ANNA
text: Sure you can. I know you can.

speaker: ANNA
text: CUZ FOR THE FIRST TIME IN FOREVER,

speaker: ELSA
text: I'M SUCH A FOOL! I CAN'T BE FREE!

speaker: ANNA
text: YOU DON'T HAVE TO BE AFRAID.

speaker: ELSA
text: NO ESCAPE FROM THE STORM INSIDE OF ME!

speaker: ANNA
text: WE CAN WORK THIS OUT TOGETHER.

speaker: ANNA
text: WE'LL REVERSE THE STORM YOU'VE MADE.

speaker: ELSA
text: ANNA, PLEASE, YOU'LL ONLY MAKE IT WORSE!

speaker: ANNA
text: WE'LL MAKE THE SUN SHINE BRIGHT.

speaker: ANNA
text: WE CAN FACE THIS THING TOGETHER...

speaker: ANNA
text: WE CAN CHANGE THIS WINTER WEATHER, AND EVERYTHING WILL BE...

speaker: ELSA
text: Who's this? Wait, it doesn't matter. You have to go.

speaker: ANNA
text: No, I know we can figure this out together--

speaker: ELSA
text: How? What power do you have to stop this winter? To stop me?

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: Anna, I think we should go.

speaker: ANNA
text: No. I'm not leaving without you, Elsa.

speaker: OLAF
text: You are a lot stronger than I think you realize.

speaker: ANNA
text: It is not nice to throw people!

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: Uh-oh. Now you made him mad!

speaker: OLAF
text: This just got a whole lot harder.

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: There's twenty feet of fresh powder down there; it'll be like landing on a pillow.... Hopefully.

speaker: OLAF
text: Ah. Ah. Man, am I out of shape.

speaker: OLAF
text: There we go. Hey, Anna! Sven! Where'd ya guys go? We totally lost Marshmallow back there!

speaker: OLAF
text: Hey. We were just talking about you. All good things, all good things.

speaker: OLAF
text: This is not making much of a difference!

speaker: ANNA
text: Hey, you were right. Just like a pillow.

speaker: OLAF
text: I can't feel my legs! I can't feel my legs!

speaker: OLAF
text: Ooh. Hey, do me a favor, grab my butt.

speaker: OLAF
text: He found us. Who's my cute little reindeer?

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: Don't talk to him like that.

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: I mean, It's fine. Ah...I'm good. Ha. I've got a thick skull.

speaker: OLAF
text: I don't have a skull.... Or bones.

speaker: ANNA
text: Now what? Now what?! Oh! What am I gonna do? She threw me out. I can't go back to Arendelle with the weather like this. And then there's your ice business--

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: Hey, hey, don't worry about my ice business... Worry about your hair?!

speaker: ANNA
text: What? I just fell off a cliff. You should see your hair.

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: It's because she struck you; isn't it?

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: No, I didn't. Anna, you need help. Now, come on.

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: Yes. And don't worry; they'll be able to fix this.

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: ...Because I've seen them do it before.

speaker: OLAF
text: I like to consider myself a love expert.

speaker: ELSA
text: Get it together. Control it. Don't feel. Don't feel. Don't FEEL!

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: So, about my friends...well, I say friends, they're more like family.... Anyway, when I was a kid, it was just me and Sven...until they took me in.

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: Yeah. I don't want to scare you, they can be a little bit inappropriate...and loud...very loud...they're also stubborn at times, and a little overbearing. And heavy. Really, really heavy.

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: But they're fine.. You'll get it. They mean well.

speaker: OLAF
text: He's crazy. I'll distract them while you run. Hi, Sven's family! It's nice to meet you! Anna, because I love you, I insist you run. I understand you're love experts! Why aren't you running?
parenthetical: (realizing) | (covertly, to Anna) | (Loud and slow to a rock) | (quietly to Anna) | (to the rock) | (to Anna)

speaker: TROLLS
text: Kristoff! Kristoff's home! It's been too long! Kristoff's home!

speaker: TROLL TWO
text: Oh, take off your clothes, Kristoff; I wash them.

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: Ah! No. I'm gonna keep my clothes on, thank you.

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: Great to see you all. Where's grandpa?

speaker: MUSHROOM KID TROLL
text: He's napping. But look, I grew a mushroom.

speaker: TROLL SCOUT KID
text: And I earned my fire crystal.

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: I've learned to just roll with it.

speaker: BULDA
text: Let me see. Bright eyes. Working nose. Strong teeth. Yes, yes, yes. She'll do nicely for our Kristoff.

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: You've got the wrong idea. That's not why I brought her here.

speaker: BULDA
text: What's the issue, dear? Why are you holding back from such a man?

speaker: TROLLS
text: IS IT THE CLUMPY WAY HE WALKS? OR THE GRUMPY WAY HE TALKS? OR THE PEAR-SHAPED, SQUARE-SHAPED WEIRDNESS OF HIS FEET? AND THOUGH WE KNOW HE WASHES WELL HE ALWAYS ENDS UP SORTA SMELLY. BUT YOU'LL NEVER MEET A FELLA WHO'S AS SENSITIVE AND SWEET. TROLLS SO HE'S A BIT OF A FIXER UPPER, SO HE'S GOT A FEW FLAWS- HIS PECULIAR BRAIN, DEAR. HIS THING FOR THE REINDEER THAT OUTSIDE A FEW OF NATURE'S LAWS. SO HE'S A BIT OF A FIXER UPPER, BUT THIS WE'RE CERTAIN OF- YOU CAN FIX THIS FIXER UPPER UP WITH A LITTLE BIT OF LOVE.

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: Can we just stop talking about this?! We've got a real, actual problem here.

speaker: BULDA
text: I'll say-- IS IT THE WAY THAT HE RUNS SCARED?

speaker: KID TROLL
text: OR THAT HE ONLY LIKES TO TINKLE IN THE WOODS?

speaker: TROLLS
text: ARE YOU HOLDING BACK YOUR FONDNESS DUE TO HIS UNMANLY BLONDENESS? OR THE WAY HE COVERS UP THAT HE'S THE HONEST GOODS? TROLLS HE'S JUST A BIT OF A FIXER UPPER- HE'S GOT A COUPLE A' BUGS.

speaker: TROLLS
text: HIS ISOLATION IS CONFIRMATION OF HIS DESPERATION FOR HEALING HUGS. SO HE'S A BIT OF A FIXER UPPER, BUT WE KNOW WHAT TO DO. THE WAY TO FIX UP THIS FIXER UPPER IS TO FIX HIM UP WITH YOU.

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: Enough! She's engaged to someone else. Okay?!

speaker: TROLLS
text: SO SHE'S A BIT OF A FIXER UPPER, THAT'S A MINOR THING. THIS QUOTE "ENGAGEMENT" IS A FLEX ARRANGEMENT.

speaker: KID TROLL
text: AND BY THE WAY, I DON'T SEE NO RING.

speaker: TROLLS
text: SO SHE'S A BIT OF A FIXER UPPER, HER BRAIN'S A BIT BETWIXT. GET THE FIANCE OUT OF THE WAY AND THE WHOLE THING WILL BE FIXED!

speaker: GIRL TROLLS
text: WE AREN'T SAYING YOU CAN CHANGE HIM

speaker: TROLLS
text: 'CAUSE PEOPLE DON'T REALLY CHANGE. WE'RE ONLY SAYING THAT LOVE'S A FORCE THAT'S POWERFUL AND STRANGE. PEOPLE MAKE BAD CHOICES IF THEY'RE MAD OR SCARED OR STRESSED. TROLLS BUT THROW A LITTLE LOVE THEIR WAY AND YOU'LL BRING OUT THEIR BEST! TRUE LOVE BRINGS OUT THE BEST!

speaker: ALL TROLLS
text: EVERYONE'S A BIT OF A FIXER UPPER, THAT'S WHAT IT'S ALL ABOUT FATHER, SISTER, BROTHER WE NEED EACH OTHER TO RAISE US UP AND ROUND US OUT

speaker: TROLLS
text: EVERYONE'S A BIT OF A FIXER UPPER, BUT WHEN PUSH COMES TO SHOVE- THE ONLY FIXER UPPER FIXER THAT CAN FIX A FIXER UPPER IS TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE LOVE

speaker: TROLL PRIEST
text: Do you, Anna, take Kristoff to be your trollfully wedded--

speaker: GRAND PABBIE
text: Anna, your life is in danger. There is ice in your heart, put there by your sister. If not removed, to solid ice will you freeze, forever.

speaker: GRAND PABBIE
text: I can't. If it was her head, that would be easy. But only an act of true love can thaw a frozen heart.

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: Anna, we've got to get you back to Hans.

speaker: OLAF
text: I'm coming! Let's go kiss Hans! Who is this Hans?!

speaker: HANS
text: We are here to find Princess Anna. Be on guard, but no harm is to come to the Queen. Do you understand?

speaker: HANS
text: Queen Elsa! Don't be the monster they fear you are.

speaker: ELSA
text: Why did you bring me here?

speaker: HANS
text: I couldn't just let them kill you.

speaker: ELSA
text: But I'm a danger to Arendelle. Get Anna.

speaker: HANS
text: If you would just stop the winter, bring back summer...please.

speaker: ELSA
text: You have to tell them to let me go.

speaker: HANS
text: I will do what I can.

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: Just hang in there. Come on, buddy, faster!

speaker: OLAF
text: I'll meet you guys at the castle!

speaker: GERDA
text: Anna! Oh, you had us worried sick.

speaker: GERDA
text: You poor girl, you're freezing. Let's get you inside.

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: Get her warm and find Prince Hans, immediately.

speaker: HANS
text: I'm going back out to look for Princess Anna.

speaker: FRENCH DIGNITARY
text: You cannot risk going out there again.

speaker: SPANISH DIGNITARY
text: If anything happens to the Princess, you are all Arendelle has left.

speaker: ANNA
text: Hans, you have to kiss me.

speaker: GERDA
text: We'll give you two some privacy.

speaker: ANNA
text: Elsa struck me with her powers.

speaker: HANS
text: You said she'd never hurt you.

speaker: ANNA
text: She froze my heart and only an act of true love can save me.

speaker: HANS
text: Oh, Anna. If only there was someone out there who loved you.

speaker: HANS
text: As thirteenth in line in my own kingdom, I didn't stand a chance. I knew I'd have to marry into the throne somewhere--

speaker: HANS
text: As heir, Elsa was preferable, of course. But no one was getting anywhere with her. But you-

speaker: HANS
text: You were so desperate for love you were willing to marry me, just like that.

speaker: HANS
text: I figured, after we married, I'd have to stage a little accident for Elsa.

speaker: HANS
text: But then she doomed herself, and you were dumb enough to go after her.

speaker: HANS
text: All that's left now is to kill Elsa and bring back summer.

speaker: HANS
text: No, you're no match for Elsa. I, on the other hand, am the hero who is going to save Arendelle from destruction.

speaker: ANNA
text: You won't get away with this.

speaker: DUKE
text: It's getting colder by the minute. If we don't do something soon, we'll all freeze to death.

speaker: HANS
text: She was killed by Queen Elsa.

speaker: HANS
text: At least we got to say our marriage vows...before she died in my arms.

speaker: DUKE
text: There can be no doubt now; Queen Elsa is a monster and we are all in grave danger.

speaker: SPANISH DIGNITARY
text: Prince Hans, Arendelle looks to you.

speaker: HANS
text: With a heavy heart, I charge Queen Elsa of Arendelle with treason and sentence her to death.

speaker: GUARD
text: She's dangerous. Move quickly and with resolve.

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: Hey, watch it. What's wrong with you?

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: ...I don't understand you when you talk like that.

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: Ah! Stop it! Put me down!

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: No, Sven! We're not going back!

speaker: ANNA
text: Olaf? Olaf. Get away from there.

speaker: OLAF
text: Whoa! So this is heat.... I love it.

speaker: OLAF
text: So, where's Hans? What happened to your kiss?

speaker: ANNA
text: I was wrong about him. It wasn't true love.

speaker: OLAF
text: Huh. But we ran all the way here?

speaker: ANNA
text: Please Olaf, you can't stay here; you'll melt.

speaker: OLAF
text: I am not leaving here until we find some other act of true love to save you.

speaker: OLAF
text: ...Do you happen to have any ideas?

speaker: ANNA
text: I don't even know what love is.

speaker: OLAF
text: Love is...putting someone else's needs before yours, like, you know, how Kristoff brought you back here to Hans and left you forever.

speaker: OLAF
text: Wow, you really don't know anything about love, do you?

speaker: OLAF
text: Some people are worth melting for.

speaker: OLAF
text: Just maybe not right this second.

speaker: OLAF
text: We're going to get through-- Oh, wait. Hang on. I'm getting something.

speaker: OLAF
text: It's Kristoff and Sven! They're coming back this way.

speaker: OLAF
text: Wow, he's really moving fast. Huh.... I guess I was wrong. I guess Kristoff doesn't love you enough to leave you behind.

speaker: OLAF
text: No, no, no, no, no. You need to stay by the fire and keep warm.

speaker: ANNA
text: I need to get to Kristoff.

speaker: OLAF
text: Why...? Oh, oh, oh, I know why.

speaker: OLAF
text: There's your act of true love, right there, riding across the fjords like a valiant, pungent reindeer king! Come on!

speaker: HANS
text: Elsa. You can't run from this!

speaker: HANS
text: Your sister? She returned from the mountain weak and cold. She said you froze her heart.

speaker: HANS
text: I tried to save her, but it was too late. Her skin was ice. Her hair turned white...

speaker: HANS
text: Your sister is dead... because of you.

speaker: OLAF
text: An act of true love will thaw a

speaker: ANNA
text: I knew you could do it.

speaker: OLAF
text: Hands down, this is the best day of my life...and quite possibly the last.

speaker: ELSA
text: Oh, Olaf. Hang on, little guy.

speaker: HANS
text: Anna? But she froze your heart.

speaker: ANNA
text: The only frozen heart around here is yours.

speaker: FRENCH DIGNITARY
text: I will return this scoundrel to his country. We shall see what his twelve big brothers think of his behavior.

speaker: DUKE
text: This is unacceptable. I am innocent. I'm a victim of fear. I've been traumatized. Ow! My neck hurts. Is there a doctor I could...No? And I demand to see the Queen!

speaker: KAI
text: I have a message from the Queen. Arendelle will henceforth and forever no longer do business of any sort with Weaseltown.

speaker: ANNA
text: Come on. Come on. Come on. Come on!

speaker: ANNA
text: Yes. And it's the latest model.

speaker: ANNA
text: You have to. No returns. No exchanges. Queen's orders. She's named you the official Arendelle Ice Master and Deliverer.

speaker: ANNA
text: Sure it is. And it even has a cup holder.... Do you like it?

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: I love it.... I could kiss you!

speaker: KRISTOFF
text: ...I could. I mean I'd like to. I'd... may I? We me....I mean, may we? Wait, what?

speaker: ELSA
text: We are never closing them again.

speaker: ANNA
text: What? Oh, Elsa, they're beautiful, but you know I don't ska--
